tasks.label: Deploy
tasks.command: git add -A && git commit -m "${input:commitMessage}" && git push origin main && echo '' && echo '✓ Pushed — auto-deploy in progress' && echo 'Frontend: https://scratch-classroom.vercel.app' && echo 'Vercel:   https://vercel.com/dashboard' && echo 'Railway:  https://railway.app/dashboard'

tasks.label: Quick Deploy
tasks.command: git add -A && git commit -m "quick update" && git push origin main && echo '✓ Pushed'
